You've been working hard.
Your body just isn't responding.

⚡
You're a high-achieving woman who treats the gym the same way you treat everything — full throttle. And it's not working.
🧠

Sound familiar

You're not failing.
You're just running on empty.

You've been consistent. You show up. You push through. And still — your body isn't changing the way it should, your energy is tanking, and somewhere along the way training started feeling like one more thing to survive instead of something that actually restores you.

01
You do everything right — and still feel stuck.
You track. You meal prep. You show up six days a week. Your discipline isn't the problem. But a depleted nervous system can't build muscle, burn fat, or recover properly — no matter how hard you train. More effort on top of exhaustion is just more damage.
02
You train hard but feel worse.
Tired. Inflamed. Disconnected from your body. You finish workouts feeling wiped instead of energized. That's not a willpower problem — that's your body telling you the approach isn't working. When training ignores your nervous system, it compounds the stress instead of relieving it.
03
You're high-achieving in every area — except this one.
You've built a career, a life, a standard of excellence. But your body keeps falling to the bottom of the list. Not because you don't care — because the way you've been taught to train wasn't designed for the life you actually live. Pushing harder was never going to be the answer.
The Shift

What if consistency didn't come from motivation — but from feeling safe enough in your body to keep showing up? Safety builds consistency. Consistency builds strength. That's not soft. That's the most strategic thing you can do.

What's inside

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built as a web app — no download, no app store. Opens on your phone or laptop from day one.

→
Daily Capacity Check-In
Before every session, you log where you actually are. 🔴🟡🟢. One tap. This shapes how you train that day — nervous system first, always.
→
4 Weeks of Fully Programmed Workouts
Every day mapped out — sets, reps, rest, and video links. Days unlock progressively so you never skip ahead before you're ready.
→
Built-In Rest Timer
Rest auto-launches after each set. 30 / 45 / 60 / 90 seconds. Because rest isn't optional — it's where the adaptation happens.
→
Daily Journal + Nervous System Prompts
Not calories. Not macros. How your body is responding. Over 30 days, this becomes data your scale will never show you.
→
SISS Phase Tracker
See exactly which phase of the Stress-Integrated Strength System™ you're in and why each one matters for your long-term results.
→
Progress + Measurements Log
Baseline at Week 1, mid-check at Week 2, full debrief at Day 30. Results tracked across the full picture — not just weight.
→
Announcements from Coach Paris
Coaching cues, reminders, and mindset prompts delivered directly inside your app throughout the 4 weeks.
Dashboard
Inside the App

Your progress.
Always in view.

From the moment you log in you can see exactly where you are — days in, workouts completed, streak, and your current week. Everything is designed to build momentum, not overwhelm.

  • Overall progress tracker
  • Week-by-week program arc
  • Daily stats at a glance
  • Coach announcements built in

Daily Check-In
Nervous System First

Before you train,
you check in.

Every session starts with a capacity check-in — Low, Moderate, or High. This single step changes how you train that day. It's not optional. It's the whole point.

  • Daily capacity rating
  • Hydration tracker built in
  • Meal log for carb cycling
  • Body progress tracking

The Program Structure

Your 4-Week Arc

Each week has a name, a purpose, and a progression. You always know where you are and why it matters.

Week 01
Re-Establish
Rebuild routines, regain momentum, create consistency.
Week 02
Reinforce
Strengthen habits, improve follow-through, increase confidence.
Week 03
Rise
Build output, elevate standards, expand capacity.
Week 04
Strengthen
Solidify progress, train with purpose, leave stronger.

where you are.

Got Questions

Frequently Asked
Questions

Everything you need to know before you begin.

Rebuild & Rise™ is a 4-week guided experience designed to help women rebuild consistency, improve structure, and train according to real-life capacity instead of extremes.

Most programs assume your body performs the same every day and rely on rigid intensity. Rebuild & Rise™ teaches you to train according to your current capacity — when to push, when to regulate, when to modify, and how to stay consistent through real life instead of repeating all-or-nothing cycles.

Many women don't fail from lack of motivation. They fail from using systems that ignore stress, recovery, energy shifts, and real-life demands. Rebuild & Rise™ was built to solve that.

You'll receive access shortly after purchase through the web-based app. You can use it on your phone, tablet, or computer — no download required.

Yes. You can save Rebuild & Rise™ to your home screen for quick daily access — it works just like a native app.

You'll receive 40 days of access from the date your program begins. This allows time to complete the 4-week experience with a built-in grace window for busy schedules, unexpected interruptions, and real life.

Because this experience was built for the woman who is ready now. The structure is designed to create momentum, follow-through, and completion — not to sit in your downloads indefinitely.

Yes. The program is beginner-friendly while still valuable for women returning to consistency or rebuilding after a period of inconsistency.

That's exactly who this was designed for. Rebuild & Rise™ helps you train based on your current capacity instead of quitting or forcing unrealistic intensity. The system works with your life, not against it.

Resume where you left off. You do not need to start over because life happened. That's exactly why your program includes 40 days of access for a 4-week experience — the buffer is built in intentionally.

Most workouts are designed to be efficient and realistic. Sessions are structured to help you stay consistent without needing hours in the gym. Exact times vary by day and phase.

Basic training equipment such as dumbbells or resistance bands is helpful depending on your setup. Some sessions can be adapted for home or gym environments.

No. Rebuild & Rise™ is not a crash weight-loss program. It is a body composition-focused experience — the emphasis is on building strength, improving muscle tone, supporting metabolism, and creating sustainable physical change.

For many women, improved body composition can support fat loss as a byproduct. But the focus is not obsessing over the scale — it's improving how your body looks, feels, functions, and performs.

No. This is a guided self-led experience. If you need personalized coaching, accountability, or custom strategy, 1:1 coaching is the next level.

Yes. Additional bonuses, reminders, and supportive resources may be sent by email to help you succeed during the program. Add support@p2fitness.online to your contacts to ensure you receive everything.

Your progress photos are stored on your own device, not within the app. You're welcome to share photos via email if you'd like feedback or support.

Due to immediate access to digital materials and program content, all sales are final and no refunds are offered. If you experience a technical issue, please contact us at support@p2fitness.online and we'll make it right.

Start as soon as you enroll. This experience is best for the woman who is ready to apply structure now — not someday.
